languages.text: "Это уже что-то. Из персонального журнала можно почерпнуть многое о личности автора... если, конечно, он вел заметки с с достаточной откровенностью. Что вам поведали записи, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "Это уже что-то. Из персонального журнала можно почерпнуть многое о личности автора... если, конечно, он вел заметки с с достаточной откровенностью. Что вам поведали записи, Лорд-капитан?"
traits.speaker: HighFactotum_MB

languages.text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"
languages.original_text: "Это уже что-то. Из персонального журнала можно почерпнуть многое о личности автора... если, конечно, он вел заметки с с достаточной откровенностью. Что вам поведали записи, Лорд-капитан?"

traits.locale_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

"That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

"That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: “那也算有些收获。一个人的私人文字往往能透露出此人的诸多信息……当然，前提是他写的时候足够坦诚。日记里都写了些什么，舰长大人？”
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: “那也算有些收获。一个人的私人文字往往能透露出此人的诸多信息……当然，前提是他写的时候足够坦诚。日记里都写了些什么，舰长大人？”

languages.text: «Eso es bueno. Las memorias de un individuo pueden revelar muchas cosas sobre su persona... suponiendo, claro está, que fuese veraz al plasmarlas por escrito. ¿Qué conclusiones ha sacado al leer el diario, Lord Capitán?».
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: «Eso es bueno. Las memorias de un individuo pueden revelar muchas cosas sobre su persona... suponiendo, claro está, que fuese veraz al plasmarlas por escrito. ¿Qué conclusiones ha sacado al leer el diario, Lord Capitán?».

languages.text: « Voilà qui est intéressant. On peut beaucoup en apprendre sur un individu en se penchant sur ses écrits... En partant du principe qu'il raconte les événements de façon fiable, bien sûr. Que vous ont appris les entrées de ce journal, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? »
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui est intéressant. On peut beaucoup en apprendre sur un individu en se penchant sur ses écrits... En partant du principe qu'il raconte les événements de façon fiable, bien sûr. Que vous ont appris les entrées de ce journal, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} ? »

languages.text: "Das ist doch etwas. Man kann sehr viel aus den persönlichen Schriften einer Person lernen ... natürlich nur unter der Maßgabe, dass er die Wahrheit geschrieben hat. Was haben Euch die Tagebucheinträge erzählt, Lord Captain?"
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist doch etwas. Man kann sehr viel aus den persönlichen Schriften einer Person lernen ... natürlich nur unter der Maßgabe, dass er die Wahrheit geschrieben hat. Was haben Euch die Tagebucheinträge erzählt, Lord Captain?"

languages.text: "Bu da bir şey. Kişisel yazılarından bir kimse hakkında pek çok şey öğrenilebilir... Tabii eğer yazdıklarında yeterince dürüst olduğu varsayılırsa. Günlük kayıtları size ne sundu Lord Kaptan?"
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: "Bu da bir şey. Kişisel yazılarından bir kimse hakkında pek çok şey öğrenilebilir... Tabii eğer yazdıklarında yeterince dürüst olduğu varsayılırsa. Günlük kayıtları size ne sundu Lord Kaptan?"

languages.text: 「それは何か。個人の文章から、その人のことをよく知ることができる。もちろん、彼が自分の話を十分に正直にしているという前提のもとではね。日記の記述から、あなたは何を学んだのですか、キャプテン卿？」
languages.original_text: "That's something. One can learn a great deal about an individual from their personal writings... that is, of course, assuming he was sufficiently truthful in his account. What did the diary entries tell you, Lord Captain?"

traits.locale_text: 「それは何か。個人の文章から、その人のことをよく知ることができる。もちろん、彼が自分の話を十分に正直にしているという前提のもとではね。日記の記述から、あなたは何を学んだのですか、キャプテン卿？」
